name: Skue Sparebank
summary: Skue Sparebank provides various banking products and services primarily in Norway. The company offers savings accounts; retirement pension products and investor services; car and other vehicle loans, mortgage loans, and small loans, as well as refinancing services; bank and credit cards, and employee packages; and mobile and online banking, and payment services. It also provides various insurance products, including children, auto, death fall, buildings, holiday home, property, income, critical illness, disability, UNG, and other insurance products; and financial advisory services. The company serves individuals and corporate market in the areas of construction, property, trade and services, and agriculture. The company was formerly known as Nes Prestegjelds Sparebank and changed its name to Skue Sparebank in October 2013. Skue Sparebank was founded in 1842 and is based in Geilo, Norway.
